channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

  2. First Fully Loaded L.N.G. Tanker Since War Began Appears to Have Crossed the Strait  The New York Times
  3. Japan Confirms Hormuz Transit as Iran Talks Continue, PM Says  Bloomberg.com
  4. Japanese supertanker appears to transit Strait of Hormuz  Nikkei Asia
  5. First full gas tanker exits Strait of Hormuz since Iran war began  New York Post

item.title: Ukraine says it shot down 33,000 Russian drones in March, a monthly record - AP News
item.description: Ukraine says it shot down 33,000 Russian drones in March, a monthly record  AP NewsView Full Coverage on Google News

item.title: In France, American Universities Lose Their Allure in the Trump Era - The New York Times
item.description: In France, American Universities Lose Their Allure in the Trump Era  The New York Times

item.title: South Korean court extends prison sentence for wife of ousted president - NPR
item.description:
1. South Korean court extends prison sentence for wife of ousted president  NPR
  2. South Korea appeals court sentences Ex-First Lady Kim Keon Hee to 4 years in jail  Reuters
  3. South Korea: Ex-first lady Kim handed longer graft sentence  DW.com
  4. Kim Keon-hee's Stock Manipulation, Bribery Convictions Upheld in Appeal  조선일보
  5. Appeals court set to rule on ex-first lady's corruption charges  The Korea Herald
